name: Data Analyst
description: Automated data analysis with pattern detection, visualization suggestions, and insight generation

config.code: const input = ctx.variables.input; return { rows: typeof input === 'string' ? input.split('\n').length : 0, preview: typeof input === 'string' ? input.substring(0, 500) : JSON.stringify(input).substring(0, 500) };

data.label: Pattern Finder
data.systemPrompt: Analyze the dataset preview. Identify patterns, anomalies, and trends. Suggest statistical tests.

data.label: Chart Advisor
data.systemPrompt: Suggest the best visualization types for this data. Include chart type, axes, and why it's appropriate.

data.label: Insight Generator
data.systemPrompt: Generate actionable business insights from the analysis and visualization suggestions.
